name: The Dune House
description: A private desert villa with a floating roof plane, shaded courtyards and an infinity edge pool framing the horizon.

name: Olaya Business Tower
description: A 32-storey commercial tower featuring a high-performance glass facade and column-free floor plates.

name: Bandra Terrace Home
description: A full interior renovation of a sea-facing apartment with custom joinery, warm oak and layered lighting.

name: Courtyard Villa
description: A family villa organised around a green central courtyard, blending indoor and outdoor living.

name: Marigold Boutique Hotel
description: A 24-key boutique hotel with terracotta arches, bespoke furniture and a rooftop lounge.

name: Corniche Residences
description: A waterfront residential development of 180 apartments with landscaped balconies and shared amenities.
